scripts.dev: npm run stockfish:sync && npm run wasm:build && vite
scripts.dev:full: npm run db:build && npm run stockfish:sync && npm run wasm:build && vite
scripts.build: npm run db:build && npm run stockfish:sync && npm run wasm:build && vite build
scripts.wasm:build: cd wasm-core && PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" wasm-pack build --target web --out-dir ../web/src/wasm_pkg
